lyrics.text: You've been running round, running round, running round throwing that dirt all on my name
lyrics.translation: 你总在四处兜圈 到处撒野 还把所有污名都扣我头上

lyrics.text: Cause you knew that I, knew that I, knew that I'd call you up
lyrics.translation: 因为你我都知道这样的话我就会给你来电

lyrics.text: You've been going round, going round, going round every party in LA
lyrics.translation: 你总是混迹在洛杉矶的各个派对

lyrics.text: Cause you knew that I, knew that I, knew that I be at one
lyrics.translation: 因为你我都明了我也会同时出现

lyrics.text: I know that dress is karma, perfume regret
lyrics.translation: 那身衣服是祸之源头 而香水引来罪恶歉疚

lyrics.text: You got me thinking 'bout when you were mine
lyrics.translation: 你总让我不断想起那些你属于我的时候

lyrics.text: And now I'm all up on ya, what you expect
lyrics.translation: 而现在我亦是悉听尊便 随你所愿

lyrics.text: But you're not coming home with me tonight
lyrics.translation: 反正今晚你也不愿意跟我回家

lyrics.text: You just want attention
lyrics.translation: 你只是想引人注意

lyrics.text: You don't want my heart
lyrics.translation: 并不是真想俘获我心

lyrics.text: Maybe you just hate the thought of me with someone new
lyrics.translation: 你只是不愿去想到我和别人会在一起

lyrics.text: Yeah, you just want attention
lyrics.translation: 你只是想引起我的注意

lyrics.text: I knew from the start
lyrics.translation: 从一开始我便心知肚明

lyrics.text: You're just making sure I'm never getting over you
lyrics.translation: 你只是想确信我还是依然忘不掉你

lyrics.text: Baby, now that we're, now that we're, now that we're right here standing face to face
lyrics.translation: 现在 你满意了吧 我俩就站在这儿 面对着面

lyrics.text: You already know, already know, already know that you won, oh
lyrics.translation: 你早就知道 早就知道 你会赢的
